title: Smoky Fluffy Spinach Soup
description: An earthy and fluffy low-calorie-friendly Malaysian dish featuring vegetable stock cube, smoke for a subtle smokiness, perfect as a light lunch or snack.
instructions: Place the vegetable stock cube in a pot, add water and bring to a boil.
Once boiling, reduce heat to low, add fresh thyme leaves and spinach. Let simmer for about 10 minutes until spinach is wilted but still tender.
Add tomato paste and salt, pepper to taste. Stir well and cook for another minute or two.
Blend soup using a hand blender or transfer the soup in batches to a blender, blend until smooth and creamy.
Serve warm as a light lunch or snack with crusty bread on the side.
